name: Matsudaira Ukon Jikencho
overview: In this gripping period drama, Matsudaira Ukon, the younger brother of the 11th Tokugawa Shogun Ienari, lives in the city as Yabutaro, a doctor in the Ukiyo Koji district, while fighting the evil that has infested the city of Edo.

trailers.title: 松平右近事件帳OP 里見浩太朗
